reviews.review_title: My name is Sigma and I'm head mod
reviews.review_description: Very Sigma game and i love soulox he my pookie

so first of all you will meet good and kind staff (I’m the best one tho) and no joke helped me with depression, funny enough before i knew what random runners was I downloaded it thinking it was gonna be some trashy fan game that Timmothy made in 5 seconds, but no, it was different actually fun and a nice community, later on I even became a moderator AND survived 2 app lab launches, if you meet any other moderator that’s not named Hawaiian in game scream at them telling them im better then them
(In game name Hawaiian)
I was so unhappy before I played this now I can’t stop this game is an addiction I can’t help myself but play it

i have been playing for basically a whole year since the very old applab and this is the best game ever. mods are nice so are the other staff. i recommend getting this tbh
btw its me clownings
I love this game I spent a dollar for the hat and I love it. My discord is chirpyogi. My quest username is chirpyogi.
